reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar, un descando en el camino, si sos vegetariano te preparan sándwichs de queso con distintos panes, buenos precios, la atención es buena pero falta simpatia.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, a rest along the way. If you're vegetarian, they make cheese sandwiches with different breads. Good prices. The service is good, but the friendliness is lacking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvZ0ktU1ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
El joven que me atendió merece un trato preferencial, atiende como a uno le gustaría que lo atendieran.Sábado de madrugada.

(Translated by Google)
The young man who served me deserves preferential treatment; he treats me the way I would like to be treated. It was early Saturday morning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvXzR1cDVBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Siguen sin funcionar las luces del parque. Pero hermoso lugar. Y otro ejemplo que no hace falta ser socio del acá para disfrutar de sus instalaciones

(Translated by Google)
The park lights are still out. But it's a beautiful place. And another example that you don't need to be a member here to enjoy its facilities.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicios pequeña , modesta pero impecable todas las instalaciones.
La atención es excelente y en el shop tiene buena variedad de comidas

(Translated by Google)
Small, modest but immaculate service station.
The service is excellent, and the shop has a good variety of food.
